user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the attendance tracking module, so that the organization can turn attendance tracking on when it is ready
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the attendance tracking module?" and Save; Then the module is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can proceed through the attendance setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the module enable option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I proceed to the next screen

user_story: As a System admin, I want to be prompted to configure dependent settings like Over Time and Flexi Schedule Settings, so that I do not miss required configuration steps
acceptance_criteria: Given the attendance tracking module is enabled; When required dependent settings are not configured; Then the Setup screen prompts me to configure Over Time and Flexi Schedule Settings
